title: On Completes $858 Million IPO
text: On Holding AG completed an initial public offering in September 2021, raising approximately $858 million in gross proceeds. The IPO consisted of 35,765,000 Class A ordinary shares priced at $24.00 per share. On shares spiked $11, or 45.8%, to $35 at market close on the first day of trading, demonstrating strong investor appetite for the premium athletic footwear and apparel brand. The successful IPO provided On with capital to fund international expansion, retail buildout, and product development. The IPO marked a major milestone for the Swiss sportswear company, enabling access to public capital markets and providing liquidity for early investors.
